column8: What about this camera? You (try) to take photos? It’s not allowed, you know... – No, I (try) to sell the camera.
column9: He says he (meet) us at the bus stop, but I’m sure he (forget) about it.
column10: He (come) if you ask him. When you (send) him the invitation?
column11: You (do) anything special tomorrow? – Yes, my nephews (come) and I (show) them round London.
column12: I hear you (go) to the regatta tomorrow. You (sail) in it?
column13: My wedding (approach). I (tell) you the exact date soon.
column14: Maria (work) today so I (get) the papers for her.
column16: I hear that you (get married) on Saturday. Your parents (come)?
column17: The train (leave) in half an hour. We (take) a taxi not to be late for it.
